productName: Refine Infused LOUD Joint - Wedding Cake x Super Boof
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Wedding Cake x Super Boof supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, pepper, and butter, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
